calendar.matters:
Order To Add Amended Osc To Calendar Without Requirement Of Publication, Declaration, And Order
Off Calendar Dec-06-2005 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for OSC hearing for Change of Name of a Minor.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Kathy Kollehner.
Petitioner: Anya Zebroski, present in pro per as Guardian ad litem for the Minor: Brooklyn Rose Comiskey, was sworn and examined.
No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct, and sufficient and that the petition should be granted.
The Court grants the petition for Change of Name of a Minor to: Brooklyn Rose Zebroski.
Decree signed in open court.

AMENDED ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Oct-04-2005 Off Calendar

AMENDED ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Sep-20-2005 Reset To Oct-04-05 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 218 For Order To Show Cause
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for OSC hearing for Change of Name of a Minor.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Noreen Ikeuye #3538.
Petitioner: Anya Zebroski, are present in pro per as Guardian ad litem for the Minor: Brooklyn Rose Comiskey, was sworn and examined.
No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing.
Lacks the Minor's Father consent or notice, the OSC for Change of Name of a Minor is continued to Oct. 4, 2005 at 9:00 a.m. in Dept. 218.
Petitioner to submit proof of service to the Minor's father of the new hearing date or Order dispensing with notice.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Apr-05-2005 Reset To May-17-05 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 218 For Order To Show Cause
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for OSC hearing for Change of Name of a Minor.
Commissioner: Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Leticia Perez.
Petitioner: Anya Zebroski, present in pro per as Guardian ad litem for the Minor: Brooklyn Rose Comiskey, was sworn and examined.
Lacks the Minor's Father consent and proof of service or notice, the OSC for Change of Name of a Minor is continued to May, 17, 2005 at 9:00 a.m. in Dept. 218.
Petitioner to submit a new application and declaration for an order dispensing with notice.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Feb-08-2005 Reset To Apr-05-05 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 218 For Order To Show Cause
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for OSC hearing for Change of Name of a Minor.
Commissioner: Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Tony Vaughn.
Petitioner: Anya Zebroski, present in pro per as Guardian ad litem for the Minor: Brooklyn Rose Comiskey, was sworn and examined.
Application requesting Order dispensing notice and declaration re due deligence, rec'd and filed in court.
Order dispensing notice DENIED without prejudice in open court.
Matter is continued to April 5, 2005 at 9:00 A.M. in Dept. 218, for petitioner to refile Application requesting Order dispensing notice and declaration.
